items.name_en: BottegaVeneta This evening bag is truly cool and beautiful.
items.name_cn:
BottegaVeneta This evening bag is truly cool and beautiful.
Each color has a unique vibe.
Andiamo is Bottega's most talked-about model recently.
If you are tired of the big logo, come appreciate the high-end feel of the woven craftsmanship.
Crafted from Nappa calfskin with fine silk weaving, the leather is incredibly delicate and soft.
Simple structure with rounded lines.
A tubular woven design combined with jewelry craftsmanship features a brass Muse metal rope knot buckle, bringing together all the classics.
Model: 741511
Size: 31*13*3

items.name_en: Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
items.name_cn:
Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
Weave Mini Basket style~Finally can be worn on the shoulder
It is based on the original bag shape with an added shoulder strap
And it is detachable!
It's like getting the use of two bags for the price of one
As the ace little cutie of the BV family
I really can't help but not own a chain style!
This bag from our shop is truly identical to the authentic one
Spending a little money to make a big impression~
Original Cowhide: Size: 20*16*13cm, Model: 5211#

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 new Loop is here!!Many girls who like BV must have owned this Loop bag before, simple appearance, classic weave, small and lightweight shape. This innovation continues the "camera bag" silhouette. Unlike the traditional Loop which can only be worn crossbody, this new version can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, satisfying both styling and daily needs. The large ring buckle allows the bag to be folded for use or used as a handle. The summer heat ☀️ usually lowers people's desire, but a lightweight bag greatly enhances the happiness of traveling 🫧

The large ring buckle allows the bag to be folded for use or used as a handle. The summer heat ☀️ usually lowers people's desire, but a lightweight bag greatly enhances the happiness of traveling 🫧
Model: 796615
Size: 19*12*9cm

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Mini Cabat Weave Basket Bag. Simple yet sophisticated, the intricate woven leather creates a complex effect with layered interlacing, taking the leather print from flat to three-dimensional. BV's most representative Cabat features unique craftsmanship and a unique weave, representing eternal fashion. The Mini Size is perfect for modern women, combining an elegant, casual attitude with ample capacity to fit your lifestyle.
items.name_cn:
BOTTEGA VENETA New Mini Cabat Weave Basket Bag. BV's most representative Cabat features unique craftsmanship and a unique weave, representing eternal fashion. The Mini Size is perfect for modern women, combining an elegant, casual attitude with ample capacity to fit your lifestyle.
Style No.: 762830
Size: 22*15.5*6.5cm

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta Python Jodie. Rare skin bags can be hard to style, but simple clothes actually highlight the natural wild beauty of the bag. As a classic BV model, this Python version breaks the original cute and sweet style. The designer's bold attempt has created a different kind of beauty. The spirit of the python represents power and mystery, corresponding to the independent and strong qualities of modern women.

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta—Color-Block Series BV Loop Camera Bag 💥, the best value for money. Large woven texture + consistently high-quality calfskin. Features a zipper and adjustable drawstring. The 'small belly' is surprisingly spacious 💫, holds everything, and is very lightweight. Suitable for girls of all ages.

Size: 22*15.5*9cm
